personality: 7 Dark-First Utility with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A high-end, stealthy tactical interface with electric neon accents that treats card valuation like a live, high-stakes dashboard.

spacing.rule: Use utility-tight spacing for data/checklists and luxe-generous vertical rhythms for the main dashboard and paywall. Thumb zones must be respected for all primary CTAs.

do's: Use frosted glass (dark tinted) for the bottom tab bar.
Use glass for the floating camera scanner controls over the live camera feed.
Use glass for the sticky 'Add to Portfolio' CTA over scrolling card details.
Ensure underlying tint is dark enough (≥75% opacity) to guarantee neon text contrast.
dont's: Never use glass on the condition checklist items or dense data rows; use solid surfaceSecondary instead.
Do not blur entire background screens.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Command center displaying total portfolio value and a grid of scanned cards.
screens.layout: Top section features an oversized 'Space Grotesk' total portfolio value on a subtle brandTertiary gradient background. Below, a 2-column grid (`flexWrap: wrap`, `justifyContent: space-between`) of saved cards with images and current market price. Use surfaceSecondary for cards.

states.empty: Luxe abstract illustration with 'Your portfolio is empty. Scan your first card.' and a prominent neon 'Scan Card' CTA.
states.error: Readable error message with a 'Retry' button.

screens.name: Camera Scanner
screens.purpose: Full-bleed viewfinder to align and detect the physical card via AI.
screens.layout: Full-screen camera view. Overlay an explicit borderStrong frame with neon brandPrimary corner brackets for alignment. Floating glass control bar at the bottom containing a large circular scan/shutter button and a flash toggle.

states.loading: Scanning animation: a brandPrimary horizontal laser line sweeping across the frame.
states.error: Message 'Card not recognized' with manual entry option.

screens.name: Condition Assessment
screens.purpose: Utility checklist for evaluating physical wear (whitening, scratches).
screens.layout: Dark-first utility layout. Single column list of criteria. Use segmented controls (`pill` radius) for grades (e.g., Near Mint, Lightly Played) on solid surfaceSecondary layers. Sticky 'Calculate Value' CTA at the bottom in a keyboard avoiding view.

screens.name: Card Detail
screens.purpose: Showcases the scanned card, live TCGplayer/Cardmarket pricing, and calculated raw value.
screens.layout: Cinematic hero card image at the top with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to ≥70% surface Inverse) to ensure text contrast. Large metrics block below using condensed typography for prices. Sticky glass bottom container with primary CTA.

states.loading: Skeleton loader for the card image and prices.
states.error: Failed to fetch market data. 'Retry' button.

screens.name: Freemium Paywall
screens.purpose: Upsell screen to unlock unlimited scans.
screens.layout: Above-the-fold layout. Dark screen with a subtle dark neon abstract background. Large value headline, 3 benefit bullet points using Phosphor icons inside brandTertiary tinted containers. Clear subscription toggle (Monthly/Yearly) and a massive brandPrimary CTA.

screens.name: Auth
screens.layout: Minimalist single-column form centered vertically. Labels above inputs. surfaceTertiary for input backgrounds. Sticky submit button at the bottom.

paywall_background.alt: Dark purple abstract background with glow

instructions_to_main_agent: No blue allowed. Maintain strict adherence to the obsidian/charcoal base with neon yellow (#D4FF00) accents.
Ensure all primary text has at least WCAG AA contrast against the dark background. Use #F3F4F6 for primary text.
For the camera scanner, utilize expo-camera with a full-bleed overlay. The framing brackets must use the brandPrimary neon yellow.
When displaying the hero card image on the Card Detail screen, MANDATORY gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (transparent to ≥70% surface color) behind any overlaid text.
Paywall must be above-the-fold and avoid scrolling. Keep pricing visible alongside the primary CTA.
Use Space Grotesk exclusively for numbers (prices, portfolio totals) to emphasize the utility/fintech feel of the valuation.
Implement haptics on condition switches and the scan capture button.
